ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the organization operates */,
  "lobby_activities" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the organization is involved in lobbying activities */,
  "political_contributions" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the organization makes political contributions */,
  "org_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "org_email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "org_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO or top executive */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number */,
  "total_assets" INTEGER /* Total value of assets managed by the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization managing the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of financial asset (e.g., Mutual Fund, Real Estate) */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the asset */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the asset */,
  "hide_max" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the maximum value is hidden from public view */,
  "asset_type_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of asset for reporting purposes */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was acquired */,
  "disposal_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was disposed of (if applicable) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current market value of the asset */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level of the asset (1-5, where 1 is low and 5 is high) */,
  "performance_index" REAL /* Performance index of the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the asset details were updated */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset manager responsible for the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type_code") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of asset */,
  "asset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the asset type (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return for the asset type */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "valuation" REAL /* Valuation of the asset at the time of the report */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with financial regulations */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Quarterly, Annual, Special) */,
  "prepared_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who prepared the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the report was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_reports_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., Asset Manager, Financial Analyst, Compliance Officer) */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions (e.g., {"can_view_reports": true, "can_edit_assets": false}) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
